function.name: code-review
function.description: Review code for correctness, security, style, and maintainability. Use when asked to review a PR, audit a file, check for bugs, or improve code quality. Covers any language.

function.name: pr-description
function.description: Write a clear, well-structured pull request description from changed files and commits. Use when asked to write, draft, or improve a PR description, changelog entry, or commit message.

function.name: web-research
function.description: Research topics on the web and summarize findings. Use when asked to look something up online, find documentation, compare libraries, check for latest versions, or gather context from external sources.

sources.description: Max number of sources to consult

function.name: context7-docs
function.description: Use this skill when you need accurate, version-aware docs for frameworks, libraries, or tooling before changing code in this repository or in generated scaffolds.

function.name: playwright-ui-testing
function.description: Use this skill to verify browser-visible behavior in generated projects or MCP-enabled workflows with Playwright before and after a fix.

function.name: repo-mcp-workflow
function.description: Use this skill when the task benefits from the repository's MCP catalog, generated workspace MCP config, or MCP-aware scaffold/install workflow.

function.name: subagent-playwright-workflow
function.description: Use this skill when a task is large enough to benefit from subagent orchestration and Playwright-based UI verification without bloating main-context tokens.
